subject: Fix addition for Component Combination
commit_message:
Fix addition for Component Combination

Add combination business logic, operation and servlet.
Modify existing classes to support combination. Added test class for Business Logic
Reworked for the comments raised by reviewers

Issue-ID: SDC-1460
Change-Id: Ieeece15073b959a8f578e4398e07024716cf7b0d
Signed-off-by: Satyaki Mallick <satyaki.mallick@huawei.com>
